subject: Geography
title: Finding the Endurance Wreck
description: A micro-lesson that makes Finding the Endurance Wreck usable.

hook.text: In 2022, the wreck of Shackleton's Endurance was found 3,000 meters deep in the Weddell Sea.

buildup.text: A search team used underwater drones to scan the freezing seabed for months.

discovery.text: The ship was remarkably preserved—the name 'Endurance' still readable on its stern.

twist.text: Antarctic Treaty rules protect it as a historic site—it cannot be touched or recovered.

climax.text: A ship sunk in 1915 lay perfectly frozen in time for over a century.

punchline.text: The cold that killed the expedition preserved it forever.

quiz.question: When was the wreck of the Endurance found?
